fallback_contact.title: Kiewit Winnipeg Regional Office — Western Canada District
fallback_contact.rationale: Kiewit's Winnipeg presence is HEAVY CIVIL / INFRASTRUCTURE — utilities, transmission, transportation. NOT vertical commercial buildings. They have an active Senior Estimator - Infrastructure (Winnipeg) job posting. This is a LOW FIT for a commercial painting subcontractor. Kiewit will not bid out commercial paint scopes from their Winnipeg office in any meaningful volume. Recommend deprioritizing or removing from list. Adam Cleveland is the company-wide Chief Estimator (Director, National Preconstruction) but is not Winnipeg-based or a relevant target for Ashrah.

needs_review_flags: Kiewit Winnipeg = heavy civil/infrastructure — LOW FIT for commercial painting
RECOMMEND removing from Ashrah's commercial-painting target list
Note for memory: Brad Harder at Bockstael is ex-Kiewit — that's the more leveraged Kiewit-related angle

sources.claim: Senior Estimator Infrastructure Winnipeg posting; civil/infrastructure focus
Adam Cleveland Director National Preconstruction & Chief Estimator (national, not Winnipeg)
